# Organization Defaults

This directory contains Vaidya Solutions' default public community-health files.

Repository-local community-health files take precedence. These defaults apply only when a repository does not provide its own equivalent file.

- `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` contains default public issue forms and chooser configuration.
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` contains the default public pull-request template.

Sensitive reports must follow the repository's `SECURITY.md` guidance.
